items.name: utils
items.title: cn (tailwind-merge configurado p/ DS)
items.description: cn() com extendTailwindMerge: presets tipograficos como font-size (L-016) + prefixos DS (pad/sp/gp/radius/sh/form) resolvidos como conflitantes. NAO e o cn padrao do shadcn.

items.name: tv
items.title: tv (tailwind-variants + twMergeConfig DS)
items.description: tv() que injeta os 23 presets tipograficos no classGroup font-size do tailwind-merge (L-016). Sem ele, text-body-* e tratado como cor e removido.

items.name: theme
items.title: Tema iGreen (Tailwind v4 @theme)
items.description: CSS @theme gerado dos tokens OKLCH. Importar DEPOIS de tailwindcss + tw-animate-css e ANTES dos componentes, senao gap-gp-*/rounded-radius-* ficam orfas.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Botao iGreen (tv()). 5 cores x 4 variants x sizes, shape, fullWidth, disabled.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Input adaptado aos tokens DS (cva). Origem interna shadcn/ - nao vaza.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Label acessivel (Radix) adaptado aos tokens DS. Base de FormField e forms.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Textarea (cva) com tokens DS e focus animado. Completa o trio de inputs do FormField.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Select (Radix) adaptado aos tokens DS. Forms e filtros. Origem interna shadcn/ - nao vaza.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Card + Header/Footer/Title/Description/Content. Tokens DS. KPIs/billing/dashboard.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Badge (tv()) - 5 cores x 4 variants x 3 sizes. Status/tags em tabelas e dashboards.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Separator (Radix) horizontal/vertical com token de borda DS. Divisoria de secoes.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Checkbox (Radix) com estado checked/indeterminate e tokens DS. Forms e selecao de tabela.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Accordion (Radix) com tokens DS.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Alert (cva) - feedback inline com tokens DS.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: AlertDialog
items.description: AlertDialog (Radix) - confirmacao destrutiva.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Avatar (Radix) Image/Fallback com tokens DS.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb com tokens DS.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Calendar (react-day-picker) com tokens DS.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Command palette (cmdk) com tokens DS. Usa o Dialog do DS.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Dialog (Radix) modal centrado com tokens DS.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: DropdownMenu
items.description: DropdownMenu (Radix) com sub/checkbox/radio e tokens DS.

items.name: input-group
items.title: InputGroup
items.description: InputGroup (cva) - input com addons/botoes.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Pagination (cva) com tokens DS.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Popover (Radix) com tokens DS.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Progress (Radix) barra com tokens DS.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: RadioGroup
items.description: RadioGroup (Radix) com tokens DS.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Sheet (Radix Dialog) drawer lateral com tokens DS.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Slider (Radix) single/range com tokens DS.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Switch (Radix) com tokens DS.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabs (Radix) com tokens DS.

items.name: form-field
items.title: FormField
items.description: FormField composite OBRIGATORIO (L-023): label+input/select/textarea/checkbox/switch + estados.

items.name: alert-modal
items.title: AlertModal
items.description: Modal de confirmacao destrutiva (tone danger/warning/success/neutral).

items.name: button-group
items.title: ButtonGroup
items.description: Split button (Primary + Chevron) com Popover. forwardRef p/ anchor Radix (L-021/022).

items.name: floating-panel
items.title: FloatingPanel
items.description: Drawer non-modal resizable/maximizavel + sheet mobile.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: Dialog modal centrado (header icon+title+desc, body, footer actions).

items.name: panel
items.title: Panel
items.description: Drawer flutuante lateral (header+body scroll+footer sticky).

items.name: footer-table
items.title: FooterTable
items.description: Footer de tabela: paginacao + page-size + range + selection count.

items.name: kanban
items.title: Kanban
items.description: Board kanban dumb (columns+cards via props) com dnd-kit.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Select com busca (autocomplete) — Popover+Command (cmdk).

items.name: card-checkbox
items.title: CardCheckbox
items.description: Checkbox apresentado como card clicavel (label+description).

items.name: chip
items.title: Chip
items.description: Pilula compacta (status/tags/filtros), span ou button + ChipGroup.

items.name: icon
items.title: Icon
items.description: Biblioteca de icones propria iGreen (SVG por prop name).

items.name: page-header
items.title: PageHeader
items.description: Title+description+badge+actions+slot (tabs/filtros). Template.

items.name: avatar-ig
items.title: Avatar (iGreen)
items.description: Avatar iGreen: size/color presets + colorHex com contraste WCAG (L-027). Distinto do primitivo @igreen/avatar.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Wrapper Recharts 3 com paleta/grid via tokens DS (ChartContainer/Tooltip/Legend).

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Primitive de tabela (grid): Head/Body/Row/Cell, density, sticky, pin, resize.

items.name: menu-sidebar
items.title: MenuSidebar
items.description: Sidebar composto: rail 64px + panel 264px colapsável.

items.name: header
items.title: Header
items.description: Barra superior fixa: breadcrumb + search/theme/notifications/user.

items.name: app-shell
items.title: AppShell
items.description: Template de app: MenuSidebar + Header + body. UserMenu, layout, tema.

items.name: data-table
items.title: DataTable + TableToolbar
items.description: Tabela densa completa: client/server, filtros visual+SQL, saved views, column types, kanban, virtualização, export. Bundla DataTable + TableToolbar (acoplamento circular) num item.

items.name: example-clientes
items.title: Exemplo — Clientes (DataTable)
items.description: Tela completa de Clientes pronta pra rodar/estudar: DataTable (busca, sort, status, ações) + PageHeader. Renderize <ClientesScreen/>.

items.name: example-finance
items.title: Exemplo — Financeiro (KPIs + DataTable)
items.description: Tela de extrato financeiro: 3 KPI cards (saldo/entradas/saídas) + DataTable de transações (status, moeda, data). Renderize <FinanceScreen/>.

items.name: example-edit-page
items.title: Exemplo — Edição (formulário)
items.description: Tela de edição/cadastro: PageHeader + Card + FormField (input, select, textarea, switch) com validação inline. Renderize <EditPageScreen/>.

items.name: example-order-detail
items.title: Exemplo — Detalhamento (abas)
items.description: Página de detalhe/detalhamento: PageHeader com badge de status + Tabs (visão geral/itens/histórico) + Cards. Renderize <OrderDetailScreen/>.

items.name: example-dashboard
items.title: Exemplo — Dashboard (KPIs + gráfico)
items.description: Dashboard: 3 KPI cards com tendência + gráfico de área (Chart/Recharts) Receita vs Meta. Renderize <DashboardScreen/>.
